zh.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Courtenay於1183年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay53歲，母親Hawise de Courcy54歲。他於1200年與Mary de Vernon在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1242年7月26日在英國多瑟特享年59歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Courtenay于1183年出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，他的父亲Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay53岁，母亲Hawise de Courcy54岁。他于1200年与Mary de Vernon在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1242年7月26日在英国多瑟特享年59岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Courtenay was born in 1183, in Okehampton, Devon, England, his father, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, was 53 and his mother, Hawise de Courcy, was 54. He married Mary de Vernon in 1200, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 July 1242, in Dorset, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Courtenay est né en 1183, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Courcy, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Vernon en 1200, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1242, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Courtenay 1183 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay 53 und seine Mutter Hawise de Courcy 54. Er hat 1200 in Devon, England Mary de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1242 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Dorset, England und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Courtenay è nato il nel 1183 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Courcy, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Vernon nel 1200, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1242, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Courtenayが1183年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenayは53歳，母Hawise de Courcyは54歳であった。1200年にイギリスデボンでMary de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1242年7月26日にイギリスドールセトで59歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Courtenay(이)가 1183년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Courcy(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1200년 영국 데폰에서 Mary de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 7월 26일 영국 도르세트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

mn.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: Okehampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Courtenay nasceu em 1183, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Courcy, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Vernon em 1200, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1242, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Courtenay родился в 1183 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Courcy, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Vernon в 1200 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 июля 1242 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Courtenay nació en 1183, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Hawise de Courcy, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Mary de Vernon en 1200, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1242, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra.
